Container.Name: firefox-sync-bridge
Container.Overview: Bridge selected Firefox Sync collections between two Mozilla accounts using ffsclient. Starts in dry-run mode by default.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent config and Firefox Sync session files. Treat this folder like a password vault.

Config.Name: Persisted Log File
Config.Description: Also write bridge logs to this file under appdata. Unraid Docker logs still show stdout.

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: true prints the merge plan without writing to either account. Set false only after dry-run output looks correct.

Config.Name: Poll Seconds
Config.Description: How often to poll Firefox Sync for changes.

Config.Name: Sync Forms
Config.Description: Bridge form autocomplete records. This can be a large collection.

Config.Name: Sync History
Config.Description: Bridge browsing history. Usually leave disabled.
